affects: The PURE investigator findings reinforce previous research in healthy individual
rationale: Carries 67% of the evidential support for conclusion C161, which is backed by 5 claims (~2.07 effective independent). Ranked by share x log2(1+support) so stubs can't dominate.
model_rationale: C157 (PURE cohort no-link finding) supports(strong) C151 and supports C161, while contradicting(disputed) C103 and C109. It is a key node reconciling multiple large cohort studies into the 'no cardiovascular harm' narrative (C183 restates C041). Flipping C157 would weaken C151, C161, and C183, and remove a major counter to the cholesterol-harm cluster.

rationale: Carries 38% of the evidential support for conclusion C133, which is backed by 7 claims (~3.81 effective independent). Ranked by share x log2(1+support) so stubs can't dominate.
model_rationale: Parallel to C124: C120 depends_on(strong) C125, and C125 is_evidence_for(strong) C133. Along with C124, this is one of only two direct strong supports for the TMAO-clotting mechanism claims; losing it undermines C133, C136, C137, C145, C146.

affects: Cholesterol, regardless of source, was associated with an increased risk of hear
rationale: Carries 29% of the evidential support for conclusion C103, which is backed by 12 claims (~6.79 effective independent). Ranked by share x log2(1+support) so stubs can't dominate.
model_rationale: C105 (pooled 29,615-adult cohort study) is_evidence_for(strong) C103, and C102/C115 both depend_on C105 methodologically. C103 in turn supports(strong) C099 and C111, and supports(asserted) C114, which supports C113. This is the single foundational data source for the entire 'cholesterol/eggs harmful' argument branch; if its validity flips, C103, C111, C114, C113, and C099 all lose their primary evidentiary base.

rationale: Carries 27% of the evidential support for conclusion C133, which is backed by 7 claims (~3.81 effective independent). Ranked by share x log2(1+support) so stubs can't dominate.
model_rationale: C120 depends_on(strong) C124 and C125; C124 also is_evidence_for(strong) C133 and C145. This single experimental result (10-fold TMAO increase after choline) is the load-bearing empirical anchor for the entire choline→TMAO→clotting mechanism, which cascades to C136, C137, C146. Flipping it would sever the mechanistic conclusions from their evidence base.
